seoTitle: Moulamein vs Mount Adrah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moulamein and Mount Adrah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Moulamein vs Mount Adrah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moulamein and Mount Adrah.
heading: Moulamein vs Mount Adrah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moulamein, New South Wales and Mount Adrah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moulamein has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mount Adrah (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moulamein or Mount Adrah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moulamein has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Mount Adrah scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moulamein scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Adrah scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moulamein or Mount Adrah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moulamein has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
